nasb.text: Then Balak said to Balaam, “Please come, I will take you to another place; perhaps it will be agreeable with God that you curse them for me from there.”

esv.text: And Balak said to Balaam, “Come now, I will take you to another place. Perhaps it will please God that you may curse them for me from there.”

cnv.text: 巴勒對巴蘭說：“你來，我領你到另一個地方去，或者　神喜歡你，你就可以在那裡為我咒詛他們。”

ccb.text: 巴勒说：“来吧，我带你去另一个地方，也许上帝会同意你在那里为我咒诅他们。”
